message:
🐛 Cache permanent errors (no OLM) to avoid repeated kubectl calls (#983)

Clusters without OLM return "doesn't have a resource type 'csv'" which
is a permanent condition. Previously this was treated the same as
transient errors (HTTP/2 stream errors), meaning every SSE stream
re-queried all non-OLM clusters. With 4 non-OLM clusters, this added
8+ unnecessary kubectl calls per operator refresh.

Now: permanent errors (no CSV resource) are cached for 5 minutes.
Transient errors still skip cache for retry on next request.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
